ai_description: The construction site appears to have workers wearing high-visibility vests and hard hats, indicating some adherence to safety protocols. The site is covered with a blue tarp and has various construction materials scattered around. Workers are standing on a partially constructed floor with exposed rebar and metal grating.
hazard_details: There is a visible safety hazard of falls from elevation, as workers are standing on a partially constructed floor with no visible guardrails or fall protection systems in place.
